text: {"matches":[{"type":"compatible-different-scope","fromIndex":0,"toIndex":1,"rationale":"Claim 0 concerns diet and general health while claim 1 concerns drinking bleach as a cure for viral infections; they address different interventions and scopes."},{"type":"compatible-different-scope","fromIndex":0,"toIndex":2,"rationale":"Claim 0 is about balanced diet supporting health, whereas claim 2 is about handwashing reducing infection transmission; they involve distinct preventive measures."},{"type":"compatible-different-scope","fromIndex":1,"toIndex":2,"rationale":"Claim 1 proposes bleach ingestion as a cure, while claim 2 promotes handwashing to lower transmission; the claims target different actions and outcomes."}]}
